name: Orange Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 large (Florida) oranges, peeled, pith removed and diced (1 1/2 cups)
1 large tomato, seeded and diced (1 cup)
1 tablespoon grated orange peel (I recommend you use organic, if you do this)
1/2 jalapeno chili pepper, minced fine (2 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the cilantro in a bowl and chill, covered, until ready to serve.
2. Before serving, stir in the cilantro.
